Public Class ManagedClusterJwtAuthenticatorIssuer Implements IJsonModel(Of ManagedClusterJwtAuthenticatorIssuer), IPersistableModel(Of ManagedClusterJwtAuthenticatorIssuer)

Docs.summary: The OIDC issuer details for JWTAuthenticator.

MemberSignature.Value: public ManagedClusterJwtAuthenticatorIssuer (string uri, System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable<string> audiences);
.method public hidebysig specialname rtspecialname instance void .ctor(string uri, class System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable`1<string> audiences) cil managed
Public Sub New (uri As String, audiences As IEnumerable(Of String))
new Azure.ResourceManager.ContainerService.Models.ManagedClusterJwtAuthenticatorIssuer : string * seq<string> -> Azure.ResourceManager.ContainerService.Models.ManagedClusterJwtAuthenticatorIssuer

Docs.param: The issuer URL. The URL must begin with the scheme https and cannot contain a query string or fragment. This must match the "iss" claim in the presented JWT, and the issuer returned from discovery.
The set of acceptable audiences the JWT must be issued to. At least one is required. When multiple is set, AudienceMatchPolicy is used in API Server configuration.

MemberSignature.Value: public System.Collections.Generic.IList<string> Audiences { get; }
.property instance class System.Collections.Generic.IList`1<string> Audiences

member this.Audiences : System.Collections.Generic.IList<string>

Docs.summary: The set of acceptable audiences the JWT must be issued to. At least one is required. When multiple is set, AudienceMatchPolicy is used in API Server configuration.
